title: T-038 — NCR Server Actions: create/update-status/assign/close (V-QA-NCR-001..007)
prompt:
# T-038 — NCR Server Actions (create/submit/assign/update-status/close)

PRD: docs/prd/09-QUALITY-PRD.md §11.4 V-QA-NCR-001..007, §5.3 signature evidence pattern, §7.1 09-d-02, §13.2 e-signature 21 CFR Part 11
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement the 5 NCR Server Actions (createNcrDraft, submitNcr, updateNcrStatus, assignNcr, closeNcr) enforcing V-QA-NCR-001..007 server-side, including 21 CFR Part 11 e-sign and dual-sign SoD on critical close. Reserve quality.ncr.* permission strings.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/src/server/quality/ncr/actions.ts — 5 Server Actions, Zod-validated inputs, role guards, RBAC checks via packages/rbac.
2. createNcrDraft → INSERT status='draft', server-clock detected_at, response_due_at auto from GENERATED column (T-037); audit log INSERT.
3. submitNcr → draft→open; enforces V-QA-NCR-003 (yield_issue cross-field), V-QA-NCR-004 (allergen_deviation must link to allergen_changeover_validation or ccp_deviation reference); description.length>=20.
4. updateNcrStatus → state machine open→investigating→awaiting_capa; quality_lead role.
5. assignNcr → sets assigned_to + investigator_id; emits inspection_assigned-style outbox event quality.ncr.assigned.
6. closeNcr → enforces V-QA-NCR-005 (rootCause + closure_signature_hash); V-QA-NCR-006 critical-severity dual sign: second signer MUST have different user_id AND have role 'prod_manager' AND a fresh authenticated session; closure_signature_hash computed server-side via hash(userId||isoTimestamp||ncrId||rootCause); status='closed'; closed_at=NOW().
7. DB trigger prevent_ncr_closed_update in migration 0111 blocks UPDATE on rows WHERE closed_at IS NOT NULL.
8. PBKDF2 PIN verification reuses shared verifyPin Server Action (see translation-notes-quality §E-Signature).
9. Permissions reserved (packages/rbac/src/permissions.enum.ts): quality.ncr.create, quality.ncr.submit, quality.ncr.assign, quality.ncr.update_status, quality.ncr.close, quality.ncr.close.critical, quality.ncr.read.

## Files
- apps/web/src/server/quality/ncr/actions.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/ncr/__tests__/actions.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/ncr/zodSchemas.ts [create]
- packages/rbac/src/permissions.enum.ts [modify]
- packages/db/migrations/0131_ncr_prevent_closed_update_trigger.sql [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
1. Given an authenticated quality_lead, when createNcrDraft(...) is called, then status='draft', response_due_at = detected_at + severity-mapped interval, audit log INSERT row exists
2. Given a draft NCR with type='yield_issue' AND target_yield_pct=NULL, when submitNcr is called, then it returns 422 error.code='V-QA-NCR-003'
3. Given critical NCR, when closeNcr is called with secondSignerUserId === session.userId, then 409 error.code='V-QA-NCR-006'; happy path with distinct prod_manager + matching PINs sets status='closed' with both signature audit rows and emits quality.ncr.closed outbox event
4. Given closed NCR, when UPDATE attempt runs, then prevent_ncr_closed_update trigger rejects the change

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: ncr/__tests__/actions.test.ts asserting all 4 AC paths before action code exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test ncr/actions' + 'pnpm --filter db migrate'

## Risk red lines
- Do not compute closure_signature_hash on client (audit B §3 red-line lift)
- Do not allow same-user dual sign (V-QA-NCR-006 server-side check)
- Do not rely on client clock for closed_at / signature timestamps
- Do not skip permissions enum reservation for quality.ncr.*
- Do not bypass PBKDF2 PIN verification (translation-notes-quality §E-Signature)

pipeline_inputs.description: Server Actions for the NCR lifecycle: createNcrDraft, submitNcr, updateNcrStatus, assignNcr, closeNcr — enforcing all V-QA-NCR-001..007 validations and 21 CFR Part 11 e-sign on close.
pipeline_inputs.details: apps/web/src/server/quality/ncr/actions.ts exports 5 Server Actions. createNcrDraft: insert with status='draft', auto-set severity-driven response_due_at via GENERATED column (T-037), accept reference_type+reference_id with FK validation. submitNcr: status='draft'→'open', enforces description.length>=20 (V-QA-NCR-005-prereq), V-QA-NCR-003 (yield_issue requires target_yield+actual_yield+claim_pct), V-QA-NCR-004 (allergen_deviation must link allergen_changeover_validation_id or ccp_deviation reference_id). updateNcrStatus: transitions via state machine open→investigating→awaiting_capa, role guard quality_lead. assignNcr: sets assigned_to + investigator_id, role guard. closeNcr: enforces V-QA-NCR-005 (rootCause + closure_signature_hash required) and V-QA-NCR-006 (critical severity requires dual sign — second signer user_id MUST differ from first signer; second signer's session must be active and have role 'prod_manager'). PIN verification via shared verifyPin Server Action using PBKDF2 (translation-notes-quality §E-Signature; audit B §3 red-line). On close: status='closed', closed_at=now() (server clock — never client), closure_signature_hash computed server-side as hash(user_id||iso_timestamp||ncr_id||rootCause). DB trigger prevent_ncr_closed_update blocks future UPDATEs on closed rows. All actions emit outbox events to quality.ncr.* (T-040 wires the channel) and write to quality_audit_log (T-009 owner). Permissions reserved: quality.ncr.create, quality.ncr.submit, quality.ncr.assign, quality.ncr.update_status, quality.ncr.close.create.critical (separate permission for critical close), quality.ncr.read. PRD anchors (verified 2026-05-14): §11.4 V-QA-NCR-001..007; §5.3 signature evidence pattern; §7.1 09-d-02 NCR CRUD scope; §13.2 e-signature 21 CFR Part 11 implementation.
out_of_scope: Do not implement outbox publisher here (T-040)
Do not implement auto-create wiring from GRN/inspection here (T-041)
Do not implement full CAPA workflow (P2 Epic 8G, BL-QA-01)
acceptance_criteria: Given an authenticated quality_lead, when createNcrDraft({type:'quality',severity:'minor',title:'X',description:'Y',reference_type:'lp',reference_id:UUID}) is called, then an ncr_reports row exists with status='draft', server-clock detected_at, response_due_at = detected_at + 7 days, and a quality_audit_log INSERT row exists
Given an existing draft NCR with type='yield_issue' AND target_yield_pct=NULL, when submitNcr(id) is called, then it returns 422 with error.code='V-QA-NCR-003' and the row stays in status='draft'

Given a critical-severity open NCR, when closeNcr(id, {rootCause:'...', firstSignerPin:'123456', secondSignerPin:'654321', secondSignerUserId:DIFFERENT_USER}) is called by quality_lead AND the second PIN matches a 'prod_manager' user, then status='closed', closure_signature_hash is non-null, both first+second signature audit rows exist, and the outbox emits a quality.ncr.closed event; if secondSignerUserId === session.userId, the action returns 409 with error.code='V-QA-NCR-006'
Given a closed NCR, when any UPDATE attempt runs (direct DB or via updateNcrStatus), then the trigger prevent_ncr_closed_update rejects with SQLSTATE 23505/45000 and the row is unchanged
test_strategy: RED: write apps/web/src/server/quality/ncr/__tests__/actions.test.ts asserting all 4 AC paths (createNcrDraft path, submitNcr V-QA-NCR-003 reject, closeNcr critical dual-sign happy path + same-user SoD reject, prevent_ncr_closed_update trigger) before actions implementation exists
Run 'pnpm --filter web test ncr/actions' + 'pnpm --filter db migrate' for trigger
risk_red_lines: Do not compute closure_signature_hash on client (translation-notes-quality §M-07; audit B §3 red-line)
Do not allow V-QA-NCR-006 dual-sign with the same user_id as first signer (server-side check against session; never trust client second-signer payload)
Do not rely on client clock for closed_at / response_due_at — server clock only (§5.3)

Do not skip permissions registration: quality.ncr.create, quality.ncr.submit, quality.ncr.assign, quality.ncr.update_status, quality.ncr.close, quality.ncr.close.critical, quality.ncr.read must exist in packages/rbac/src/permissions.enum.ts
Do not bypass PBKDF2 PIN verification (audit B §3; BL-QA-06 is keylogger risk — keypad is medium-prio UI follow-up, not a Server Action concern)
